figures.caption: Figure 8 (a) Naive 1F1B pipeline: overlaps inter-stage communication but leaves all-to-all unhidden. (b) AF-Pipe overview: treats MoE communication as a first-class pipeline stage. (c) Multi-stream execution: overlaps computation and communication across streams.

Figure 10 End-to-end training throughput across different sequence lengths (4K–32K) on DeepSeek-MoE, GPT-OSS, and Qwen3. DisagMoE consistently outperforms Megatron, Tutel, Comet, and DualPipe, achieving up to 1.81× speedup over Megatron-1F1B and 1.34× over state-of-the-art MoE overlap systems.
Figure 2 Overview of MoE architecture, EP, and Attention-FFN Disaggregated architecture.
